# Pull Request

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Description

> Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Include relevant motivation and context. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] Refactor (code improvement without changing functionality)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation (updating or adding documentation)
- [ ] Test (adding or updating tests)

## Checklist

**Required**

- [ ] I have merged or rebased `main` into my branch
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] My code follows the project's existing style and conventions
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] License headers are present on all new source files

**Optional**

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have verified checkstyle compliance (`./gradlew checkstyleMain`)
